title: Pivot Table not working in excel sheet
author: aliMalik103
body: After reading excel file i update sheet 2. Pivot table is in sheet one but when i exported the excel Pivot table converted to sheet.

comments.author: guyonroche
comments.body:
This is because Pivot Tables are not yet supported by exceljs.
Looking at the pivot table structures in an xlsx file it looks quite involved, I'm not sure when I will be able to look into it

comments.author: Wegner
comments.body: @guyonroche any plans to implement pivot tables yet?
